mentions.note: Still needs Chinese buyers back; after brutal run, trim holdings rather than buy; cyclical at wrong part of cycle.
Chemical stock alongside Lyondell — both working well in current environment. Two-for-one recommendation.
Polyethylene/chemical play up 78% Q1; textbook cyclical rebounded Jan on rate-cut hopes; vulnerable to pullback if strait reopens and oil falls.

Up 65% YTD from sixth-worst performer; solid Q1 (revenue beat, smaller loss); Strait of Hormuz closure creating record chemical pricing power (10-30 cents/lb uplift); supply delays last through 2026-2027; Q2 guidance $12B revenue, $2B EBITDA with upside; tracking $6B annualized EBITDA well above consensus.
Persian Gulf competitors going offline lifts industry prices to pure profit for Dow, which also uses cheaper domestic energy.
